# Let's load the quranic_verses.json to find the exact ayah text.
import json, sys, os, re, unicodedata

qpath = '/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json'
hpath = '/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json'

with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)

len(qdata), list(qdata.keys())[:10] if isinstance(qdata, dict) else None

target = "فَأَمَّا الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا فَمِنْكَ رِجْزُهُمْ ۖ وَعَسَىٰ أَنْ يَكُونُوا إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يُرْجَعُونَ"
# search exact
matches = [item for item in qdata if item.get('ayah_text') == target]
len(matches), matches[:3]

# Build normalization functions and compute similarities

import re
arabic_tashkeel = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'
# punctuation characters include Arabic punctuation and common ones
punctuation_regex = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0621-\u064A\u0660-\u0669]')  # keep Arabic letters and numbers and whitespace

def normalize_arabic(text):
    if text is None:
        return ''
    # normalize different hamza forms to bare hamza? We'll map hamza forms to a simple form
    # Map: ء (hamza) keep; أ إ آ to ا? The instruction says unify hamza; we will replace all hamza-with-alef variants with ا or maybe with ء? 
    # Common normalization: replace Alef variants with ا, replace Teh Marbuta to ه? But instructions limited. We'll replace alef variants with ا.
    text = text.replace(tatweel, '')
    # remove tashkeel
    text = arabic_tashkeel.sub('', text)
    # unify alef
    text = text.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # normalize hamza on waw/yeh? Replace 'ؤ' with 'و', 'ئ' with 'ي'? Not necessarily; they said unify hamza; we'll replace 'ؤ'-> 'و', 'ئ'->'ي', 'ء'->'ء' maybe best to map to ء? But many datasets keep them, but we'll map to plain hamza 'ء' for all.
    text = text.replace('ؤ','ء').replace('ئ','ء')
    # remove punctuation such as 'ۖ' and other ornate chars
    # Keep Arabic letters and spaces; remove other punctuation
    # But we should keep diacritics already removed.
    # Replace multiple spaces with single space
    # Remove other punctuation using regex
    # But caution: digits and english words remove; ok.
    text = punctuation_regex.sub(' ', text)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # lowercase not applicable for Arabic; but do return.
    return text

# LCS function
def lcs_len(a, b):
    # a,b strings; compute length of longest common subsequence? Actually Longest Common Substring maybe better.
    # We'll compute longest common substring length.
    m = len(a)
    n = len(b)
    # dynamic programming for substr
    L = [[0]*(n+1) for _ in range(m+1)]
    longest = 0
    for i in range(m):
        for j in range(n):
            if a[i] == b[j]:
                L[i+1][j+1] = L[i][j] + 1
                if L[i+1][j+1] > longest:
                    longest = L[i+1][j+1]
    return longest

# token-level F1
def token_f1(a, b):
    # split by spaces
    a_tokens = a.split()
    b_tokens = b.split()
    if not a_tokens and not b_tokens: return 1.0
    if not a_tokens or not b_tokens: return 0.0
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(a_tokens)
    cb = Counter(b_tokens)
    common = sum((ca & cb).values())
    prec = common / len(a_tokens)
    rec = common / len(b_tokens)
    if prec + rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

# Normalize target
full_target = "فَأَمَّا الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا فَمِنْكَ رِجْزُهُمْ ۖ وَعَسَىٰ أَنْ يَكُونُوا إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يُرْجَعُونَ"
snippet = "فَأَمَّا ا...ُرْجَعُونَ"
norm_full_target = normalize_arabic(full_target)
norm_full_target, len(norm_full_target)

# compute similarity scores
scores = []
for item in qdata:
    ay = item.get('ayah_text') or ''
    norm_ay = normalize_arabic(ay)
    lcs = lcs_len(norm_ay, norm_full_target)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(norm_ay), len(norm_full_target))
    t_f1 = token_f1(norm_ay, norm_full_target)
    scores.append((t_f1, lcs_ratio, item))

# sort by token_f1 then lcs
scores_sorted = sorted(scores, key=lambda x: (max(x[0], x[1])), reverse=True)
top = scores_sorted[:20]
[(s[0], s[1], s[2]['surah_name'], s[2]['ayah_id'], s[2]['ayah_text']) for s in top[:15]]

candidates = [item for item in qdata if item['surah_name']=='هود' and item['ayah_id']==116]
len(candidates), candidates[:3]

# search for 'رجز' occurrences
hits = [item for item in qdata if 'رجز' in (item.get('ayah_text') or '')]
len(hits), hits[:20]

norm_target = normalize_arabic(full_target)
# find items where normalized ayah contains norm_target as substring
contains = [item for item in qdata if norm_target in normalize_arabic(item.get('ayah_text',''))]
len(contains), contains[:10]

# search for normalized token presence
def find_by_norm_sub(sub):
    nsub = normalize_arabic(sub)
    matches = [item for item in qdata if nsub in normalize_arabic(item.get('ayah_text',''))]
    return matches

find_by_norm_sub("الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا")[:10], len(find_by_norm_sub("الَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا"))
find_by_norm_sub("عَسَىٰ أَنْ يَكُونُوا")[:10], len(find_by_norm_sub("عَسَىٰ أَنْ يَكُونُوا"))
[c for c in qdata if 'رجزهم' in normalize_arabic(c.get('ayah_text',''))][:20], sum(1 for c in qdata if 'رجزهم' in normalize_arabic(c.get('ayah_text','')))
find_by_norm_sub("إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يُرْجَعُونَ")[:20], len(find_by_norm_sub("إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يُرْجَعُونَ"))
find_by_norm_sub("الى ربهم يرجعون")[:20], len(find_by_norm_sub("الى ربهم يرجعون"))

# search for 'رجز' or 'رج' in normalized texts
hits = [item for item in qdata if 'رج' in normalize_arabic(item.get('ayah_text',''))]
len(hits), hits[:20]

import difflib, math, time
norm_target = normalize_arabic(full_target)
best = []
for item in qdata:
    norm_ay = normalize_arabic(item.get('ayah_text',''))
    ratio = difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, norm_ay, norm_target).ratio()
    best.append((ratio, item, norm_ay))
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
best_sorted[:20]
